metadata.title: Studio Échelle — Luxury Interior Design & Architecture
metadata.description: High-end interior design and architecture studio based in Doha, Qatar. Specialising in luxury residential villas, commercial projects, and landscape design across the GCC.

hero.title: Designed for Permanence
hero.tagline: We design with love, for form, for material, and for the people who live with our work.

statement.manifesto: Every detail is intentional. Every project, personal.
statement.extended: We believe great design quietly transforms space and stirs feeling.

interior.name: Interior Design
interior.description: Crafting refined residential and commercial interiors that balance material authenticity with spatial harmony.

architecture.name: Architectural Design
architecture.description: Shaping structures that resonate with their surroundings through thoughtful form, proportion, and light.

landscape.name: Landscape Design
landscape.description: Extending living spaces outward with considered planting, hardscape, and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.

fitout.name: Fit-Out Supervision
fitout.description: Overseeing every detail of execution to ensure design intent is faithfully realised on site.
